title: Garlicky Pork Skillet
description: A savory skillet dish loaded with flavor, perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced pork and cook until browned on both sides, about 5-6 minutes.
Remove the pork from the skillet and set aside.
Add the remaining 1 tablespoon of olive oil to the skillet.
Add the sliced onion and bell pepper; cook until the vegetables are tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional 1 minute.
Add the sliced potatoes and cook for 2-3 minutes.
Return the cooked pork to the skillet and stir to combine with the vegetables.
Sprinkle with skillet seasoning and serve hot.
